description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble an elephant, featuring a soft, light gray fabric exterior. The toy has large, floppy ears with white inner sections and a long, prominent trunk extending from its face. Small, round, dark eyes and subtle pink dots on the cheeks give it a gentle, friendly appearance. Its limbs are short and rounded, with the arms slightly outstretched and the legs positioned to support a standing posture. A small tail is visible at the back, and a dark stripe runs diagonally across its body, possibly representing a sash or accessory. The overall construction appears cuddly and child-friendly, with no sharp or hard elements.
description: A soft, light gray elephant stuffed toy with large floppy ears, a long trunk, and a dark diagonal stripe across its body. It has a gentle, friendly face and a plush, huggable form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elephant's face, trunk, large ears, and the dark diagonal stripe across its body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the trunk, the thickness of the ears, and the continuation of the dark stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ears, the small tail, and the absence of facial features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the trunk, ear, and the dark stripe, with a glimpse of the tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and neutral, with small, round eyes and subtle pink dots on the cheeks. There is no visible mouth, giving it a calm and serene appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, the head facing forward and the trunk extending downward.
